notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Justin Crawford reaches on a fielder's choice. Bryson Stott to 3rd. Bryson Stott advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by third baseman Josh Rojas.

notableEvents.label: Bryson Stott GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Bryson Stott grounds into a double play, pitcher Luinder Avila to shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to first baseman Jac Caglianone. Alec Bohm out at 2nd. Bryson Stott out at 1st.
